use_cases: Creating interactive hero sections with particle-based typography that responds to mouse movement
Building attention-grabbing landing page headers with attract/repel particle effects
Designing creative portfolio showcases with animated text particles
Adding dynamic visual elements to marketing pages that draw user engagement
Implementing distinctive text animations in creative SaaS applications
ai_summary: A particle text rendering component that creates text from individual WebGL particles with interactive mouse-based attraction and repulsion effects. Features multi-layered glow shaders, configurable color schemes, and smooth physics-based animations. Ideal for distinctive hero sections and creative landing pages requiring engaging visual effects.
